title: OpenRouter Web Search Tool
description: Configuration schema for the OpenRouter web_search server tool

parameters.title: Search Parameters
parameters.description: Optional parameters to customize search behavior

max_results.title: Max Results
max_results.description: Maximum results per search call. Applies to Exa, Firecrawl, Parallel, and Perplexity engines; ignored with native provider search.

ui.help: Range: 1–25 (1–20 for Perplexity)

max_total_results.title: Max Total Results
max_total_results.description: Maximum total results across all search calls in a single request. Useful for controlling cost and context size in agentic loops.

search_context_size.title: Search Context Size
search_context_size.description: How much context to retrieve per result. For Exa, pins a fixed per-result character cap (5K/15K/30K); when omitted, Exa picks adaptively (~2–4K per result). For Parallel, controls total characters across all results. For Perplexity, maps to the Search API's native search_context_size parameter. Ignored with native provider search and Firecrawl. Overridden by max_characters when both are set.

enumDescriptions.medium: ~15K chars per result (Exa) / default for Parallel

max_characters.title: Max Characters
max_characters.description: Exact maximum characters of content per result. Applies to Exa, Parallel, and Perplexity; ignored with native provider search and Firecrawl. For Exa, caps highlight content per result. For Parallel, caps excerpt content per result (default 1,500 when omitted). For Perplexity, converted to a token budget via max_tokens_per_page and trimmed to the exact character cap. When both max_characters and search_context_size are set, max_characters takes precedence.

ui.help: Range: 1–100,000. Overrides search_context_size when set.

user_location.title: User Location
user_location.description: Approximate user location for location-biased results. Currently only supported by native provider search; ignored with Exa, Firecrawl, Parallel, and Perplexity.

allowed_domains.title: Allowed Domains
allowed_domains.description: Limit results to these domains. Supported by Exa, Firecrawl, Parallel, Perplexity, and most native providers.

excluded_domains.title: Excluded Domains
excluded_domains.description: Exclude results from these domains. Supported by Exa, Firecrawl, Parallel, Perplexity, and some native providers.

title: OpenRouter Datetime Tool
description: Configuration schema for the OpenRouter datetime server tool

parameters.title: Datetime Parameters
parameters.description: Optional parameters to customize datetime behavior

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: IANA timezone name used to determine the current date and time.

ui.help: Must be a valid IANA timezone name (e.g. "America/New_York", "Europe/London", "Asia/Tokyo")

title: OpenRouter Image Generation Tool
description: Configuration schema for the OpenRouter image_generation server tool

parameters.title: Image Generation Parameters
parameters.description: Optional parameters to customize image generation output

model.title: Model
model.description: Which image generation model to use.

ui.help: See available image models in OpenRouter docs

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Image quality level. Available values are model-dependent.

ui.help: Model-dependent; not all models support all quality levels

aspect_ratio.title: Aspect Ratio
aspect_ratio.description: Desired aspect ratio of the generated image.

ui.help: May be mutually exclusive with size depending on the model

background.title: Background
background.description: Background style of the generated image.

output_format.title: Output Format
output_format.description: File format of the returned image.

output_compression.title: Output Compression
output_compression.description: Compression level for lossy output formats (jpeg, webp). Has no effect on png.

ui.help: Range: 0–100. Only applies to lossy formats (jpeg, webp).

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.description: Content moderation level applied to the generation request.

title: OpenRouter Web Fetch Tool
description: Configuration schema for the OpenRouter web_fetch server tool

parameters.title: Web Fetch Parameters
parameters.description: Optional parameters to customize web fetch behavior

max_uses.title: Max Uses
max_uses.description: Maximum number of fetches per request. Once exceeded, the tool returns an error.

max_content_tokens.title: Max Content Tokens
max_content_tokens.description: Maximum content length in approximate tokens. Content exceeding this limit is truncated.

allowed_domains.title: Allowed Domains
allowed_domains.description: Only fetch from these domains. Requests to any other domain will be blocked.

blocked_domains.title: Blocked Domains
blocked_domains.description: Never fetch from these domains. Requests to these domains will always be blocked.

title: OpenRouter Fusion Tool
description: Configuration schema for the OpenRouter fusion server tool — runs a panel of models in parallel with web_search and web_fetch enabled, then synthesizes results via a judge model.

parameters.title: Fusion Parameters
parameters.description: Optional parameters to override fusion defaults

analysis_models.title: Analysis Models
analysis_models.description: Models that form the panel. Each runs in parallel with openrouter:web_search and openrouter:web_fetch enabled. Defaults to a quality preset (~anthropic/claude-opus-latest, ~openai/gpt-latest, ~google/gemini-pro-latest).

ui.help: 1–8 models allowed. Each model runs in parallel with web_search and web_fetch.

model.title: Judge Model
model.description: The model that produces the structured analysis JSON from the panel responses. Defaults to the same model handling your outer request.

ui.help: The judge always runs at temperature 0.

max_tool_calls.title: Max Tool Calls
max_tool_calls.description: Maximum tool-calling steps each panel model and the judge may take in their web_search / web_fetch loop before they must return text.

ui.help: Range: 1–16. Applies to each panel model and the judge independently.

max_completion_tokens.title: Max Completion Tokens
max_completion_tokens.description: Maximum output tokens (including reasoning) per inner panel or judge call. Keeps reasoning-heavy models from exhausting their budget before producing visible text.

reasoning.title: Reasoning Config
reasoning.description: Reasoning configuration forwarded to both panel and judge calls.

ui.help: Forwarded to panel and judge calls. Provider default if omitted.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Temperature forwarded to the panel model calls. The judge always runs at temperature 0 regardless of this setting.

ui.help: Range: 0–2. Only applies to panel models; judge is always 0.

title: OpenRouter Advisor Tool
description: Configuration schema for the OpenRouter advisor server tool — consults a sub-agent model that can optionally use OpenRouter server tools and see the parent conversation.

parameters.title: Advisor Parameters
parameters.description: Optional parameters to configure the advisor sub-agent

name.title: Name
name.description: Optional name for this advisor. The model sees one tool per named advisor (plus one default for an entry with no name). Names must be unique across entries.

ui.help: Letters, digits, spaces, underscores, and dashes only. 1–64 chars. Must be unique across advisor entries.

model.title: Advisor Model
model.description: The advisor model to consult. Any OpenRouter model is supported. Defaults to the outer request model.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.description: System instructions for the advisor sub-agent.

ui.placeholder: e.g. You are a senior staff engineer. Be decisive.

tools.title: Advisor Tools
tools.description: Tools made available to the advisor sub-agent. Only OpenRouter server tools are supported (e.g. openrouter:web_search). Function tools are rejected with a 400 error. The advisor may not list itself.

ui.help: Only OpenRouter server tools supported. The advisor cannot list itself as a tool.

forward_transcript.title: Forward Transcript
forward_transcript.description: When true, the full parent conversation is forwarded to the advisor (and the tool-call prompt, if given, is appended as a final user turn). When false, the advisor sees only the prompt.

stream.title: Stream
stream.description: When true, advice streams incrementally as it is produced. Responses API only.

max_tool_calls.title: Max Tool Calls
max_tool_calls.description: Maximum tool-calling steps the advisor sub-agent may take. Only relevant when the advisor has tools.

ui.help: Range: 1–25. Only applies when advisor tools are configured.

max_completion_tokens.title: Max Completion Tokens
max_completion_tokens.description: Maximum output tokens (including reasoning) for the advisor call.

reasoning.title: Reasoning Config
reasoning.description: Reasoning configuration forwarded to the advisor call.

ui.help: Forwarded to the advisor call. Provider default if omitted.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Sampling temperature forwarded to the advisor call.

ui.help: Range: 0–2.

title: OpenRouter Subagent Tool
description: Configuration schema for the OpenRouter subagent server tool — delegates tasks to a worker model that is typically smaller, cheaper, and faster than the delegating model.

parameters.title: Subagent Parameters
parameters.description: Optional parameters to configure the subagent worker

model.title: Worker Model
model.description: The worker model that executes delegated tasks. Any OpenRouter model is supported. Typically smaller, cheaper, and faster than the delegating model. Defaults to the outer request model.

ui.help: Typically a smaller, faster model than the one making the outer request.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.description: System instructions for the worker sub-agent.

ui.placeholder: e.g. You are a fast, focused worker. Complete the task efficiently.

tools.title: Worker Tools
tools.description: Tools made available to the worker. Only OpenRouter server tools are supported (e.g. openrouter:web_search). Function tools are rejected with a 400 error. The subagent may not list itself.

ui.help: Only OpenRouter server tools supported. The subagent cannot list itself as a tool.

max_tool_calls.title: Max Tool Calls
max_tool_calls.description: Maximum tool-calling steps the worker may take. Only relevant when the worker has tools. Accepted and validated but not yet enforced on the worker call.

ui.help: Range: 1–25. Only applies when worker tools are configured. Not yet enforced on the worker call.

max_completion_tokens.title: Max Completion Tokens
max_completion_tokens.description: Maximum output tokens (including reasoning) for the worker call.

reasoning.title: Reasoning Config
reasoning.description: Reasoning configuration for the worker call. effort is forwarded to the worker; max_tokens is accepted and validated but not yet forwarded.

effort.title: Effort
effort.description: Reasoning effort level forwarded to the worker.

max_tokens.title: Max Reasoning Tokens
max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens allocated for reasoning. Accepted and validated but not yet forwarded to the worker.

ui.help: Note: accepted and validated but not yet forwarded to the worker call.
effort is forwarded; max_tokens is validated but not yet forwarded.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Sampling temperature forwarded to the worker call.

ui.help: Range: 0–2.

title: Anthropic Web Search Tool
description: Gives Claude real-time web access with cited sources. Executes server-side on Anthropic infrastructure.

type.title: Tool Version
type.description: Versioned type string. Use the latest unless you need a specific capability.

max_uses.title: Max Uses
max_uses.description: Maximum number of searches per request. If exceeded, further searches return a max_uses_exceeded error. Omit to allow unlimited searches.

ui.help: Simple queries: 1–3. Comparative research: 10–20. Latency-sensitive: set to 3.

allowed_domains.title: Allowed Domains
allowed_domains.description: Restrict results to only these domains.

blocked_domains.title: Blocked Domains
blocked_domains.description: Never include results from these domains.

user_location.title: User Location
user_location.description: Localize search results to an approximate user location.

response_inclusion.title: Response Inclusion
response_inclusion.description: Controls whether search result blocks consumed by a completed code_execution call are included in the response. Use 'excluded' to reduce output token costs in agentic workflows. Requires web_search_20260318.

title: Anthropic Web Fetch Tool
description: Fetches full content from specific URLs (HTML pages and PDFs). Executes server-side on Anthropic infrastructure. Does not support JavaScript-rendered pages.

type.title: Tool Version
type.description: Versioned type string. Use the latest unless you need a specific capability.

enumDescriptions.web_fetch_20260318: Latest — dynamic filtering + cache bypass + response_inclusion control

max_uses.title: Max Uses
max_uses.description: Maximum number of fetches per request.

max_content_tokens.title: Max Content Tokens
max_content_tokens.description: Maximum content length in approximate tokens. Content exceeding this limit is truncated. Note: the actual token count may vary slightly.

response_inclusion.title: Response Inclusion
response_inclusion.description: Controls whether fetch result blocks consumed by a completed code_execution call are included in the response. Use 'excluded' to reduce output token costs in agentic workflows. Requires web_fetch_20260318.

title: Anthropic Code Execution Tool
description: Runs Bash commands and manipulates files in a secure sandboxed container (Python 3.11, 5GiB RAM, 5GiB disk, no internet). Executes server-side on Anthropic infrastructure. Free when used alongside web_search_20260209+ or web_fetch_20260209+.

enumDescriptions.code_execution_20260521: Latest — same runtime as 20260120, discloses 90s per-cell time limit in tool description
enumDescriptions.code_execution_20260120: REPL state persistence + programmatic tool calling from within sandbox
enumDescriptions.code_execution_20250825: Bash commands + file operations (broadest model support)

ui.info: The code execution tool takes no additional parameters. Once enabled, Claude automatically gains access to bash_code_execution (shell commands) and text_editor_code_execution (file view/create/edit) sub-tools.

title: Anthropic Advisor Tool
description: Pairs a faster executor model with a higher-intelligence advisor model. The advisor receives the full conversation transcript and returns a strategic plan; the executor continues at its lower cost. Beta: requires header 'advisor-tool-2026-03-01'.

model.title: Advisor Model
model.description: The higher-intelligence model that provides strategic guidance. Must be at least as capable as the executor model (set via the top-level 'model' field of the API request).

ui.help: Billed at advisor model rates for each sub-inference. Valid executor/advisor pairs are enforced by the API.

max_uses.title: Max Uses (per request)
max_uses.description: Maximum advisor calls allowed in a single request. Once reached, further calls return max_uses_exceeded and the executor continues without advice. Note: this is per-request, not per-conversation — track conversation-level limits client-side.

max_tokens.title: Max Advisor Output Tokens
max_tokens.description: Caps the advisor's total output (thinking + text) per call. The server also informs the advisor of its remaining budget so it can shape its response. Minimum: 1024. Recommended starting point: 2048.

ui.help: 2048 reduces mean output ~7x with near-zero truncation. 1024 reduces ~10x but truncates ~10% of calls.

caching.title: Advisor-side Prompt Caching
caching.description: Enables prompt caching for the advisor's own transcript across calls within a conversation. Breaks even at ~3 advisor calls per conversation; beneficial for longer agent loops.

ttl.title: Cache TTL
ttl.description: How long the cache entry lives.

ui.help: Enable only if you expect 3+ advisor calls per conversation. Keep it consistent — toggling mid-conversation causes cache misses.

title: Anthropic Tool Search Tool
description: Lets Claude search across hundreds or thousands of deferred tool definitions without loading them all into context upfront. Tools marked defer_loading:true are excluded from the initial system prompt and loaded on demand when tool search returns a tool_reference for them. Requires beta header 'tool-search-tool-2025-10-19'.

type.title: Search Algorithm
type.description: Two variants are available, representing different search algorithms — neither supersedes the other.

enumDescriptions.tool_search_tool_bm25_20251119: BM25 — keyword relevance ranking, best for natural language tool descriptions
enumDescriptions.tool_search_tool_regex_20251119: Regex — pattern matching, best for structured tool names

ui.info: To use tool search, mark tools you want deferred with defer_loading:true. Tool search finds and loads them on demand, preserving your prompt cache.

title: Anthropic MCP Connector
description: Connects Claude to remote Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, making their tools available server-side without client-side execution. Not date-versioned — versioning is carried in the anthropic-beta header. Requires beta header 'mcp-client-2025-11-20'.

server_url.title: MCP Server URL
server_url.description: The URL of the remote MCP server to connect to.

server_name.title: Server Name
server_name.description: A human-readable name for this MCP server (used in tool descriptions shown to Claude).

allowed_tools.title: Allowed Tools
allowed_tools.description: Restrict which tools from the MCP server Claude can call. If omitted, all tools from the server are available.

headers.title: Auth Headers
headers.description: HTTP headers to include when connecting to the MCP server (e.g. Authorization).

ui.info: mcp_toolset is not date-versioned. The MCP connector does not support strict:true or defer_loading.
